subject: Marshal route: Slice A commit window only
body: Controller route: allow Arboreal Slice A commit window only. Fronded GO is in, Torrid GO for Slice B will wait until Slice A lands or clears. Please watch for a short git:index/head claim, exact commit-queue intent, exact staged pathspecs, and no Nebulous files or coordination residue in the Slice A commit. Exact Slice A paths: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/snapshot.ts; agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/operator-value.ts; agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/text.ts; agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts; agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-text.unit.test.ts.
